intro.summary: Have a frontend build, CMS update, internship opportunity, or collaboration in mind? Send the details and I will reply with a clear next step.
intro.availability: Open to internships and freelance work.

quickContactCards.title: Direct inbox
quickContactCards.text: Best for project details, internship conversations, and follow-ups.

quickContactCards.title: Code profile
quickContactCards.text: Review my public repositories and current learning progress.

quickContactCards.title: Professional network
quickContactCards.text: Connect for roles, collaborations, and professional updates.

quickContactCards.title: Pakistan based
quickContactCards.text: Available for remote frontend, CMS, and learning-focused opportunities.

formIntro.title: Tell me about the work
formIntro.summary: Share the project purpose, timeline, and anything I should know before replying.

detailCards.title: Usually within 24 hours
detailCards.text: I read every message and reply with the next useful step.

detailCards.title: Frontend UI and web builds
detailCards.text: Landing pages, portfolio sites, dashboards, CMS work, and responsive interfaces.

detailCards.title: Open to internships and freelance work
detailCards.text: Best fit is a team or project where I can contribute, learn, and ship carefully.

ctaStrip.text: You can also reach me directly if the form is unavailable or you want to continue a conversation.
